entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region in Africa characterized by semi-arid tropics where agricultural research is targeted.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: Research aimed at improving agricultural productivity and development.

entities.name: POLICY
entities.description: Governmental or organizational rules and regulations affecting agriculture.

entities.name: MARKET CONDITIONS
entities.description: The economic environment and factors influencing the trade of agricultural products.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD LIVELIHOOD STRATEGIES
entities.description: The methods and plans used by rural households to sustain their living.

entities.name: INVESTMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: The plans and decisions made by smallholder farmers regarding resource allocation.

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY CHOICE
entities.description: The process by which farmers select specific agricultural technologies.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Tools, techniques, and systems used to improve farming practices.

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL ARRANGEMENTS
entities.description: The organizational structures and rules that support agricultural research.

entities.name: BIOPHYSICAL FACTORS
entities.description: Natural environmental conditions such as soil, climate, and water availability.

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC FACTORS
entities.description: Social and economic variables affecting farming communities.

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL FACTORS
entities.description: Factors related to the organization and governance of agricultural systems.

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY ADOPTION
entities.description: The process of accepting and implementing new agricultural technologies.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Center for Semi-Arid Tropics, an international research institute.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID AREAS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low rainfall and arid conditions.
